title: nepeta olgae
intro: Nepeta olgae, also known as catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Central Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nepeta olgae include its ability to alleviate anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Nepeta olgae can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
